title: Section 2A
content: 1[2A. Interpretation of certain words and expressions. --Words and expressions used and not defined in this Act but defined in the Life Insurance Corporation Act, 1956 (31 of 1956), the General Insurance Business (Nationalisation) Act, 1972 (57 of 1972) and the Insurance Regulatory and Development Authority Act, 1999 shall have the meanings respectively assigned to them in those Acts.]
footnote: 1. Ins. by Act 41 of 1999, s. 30 and the Fifth Schedule (w.e.f. 19-4-2000).
